duas.arabicText: وَبِصَوْمِ غَدٍ نَّوَيْتُ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
duas.transliteration: Wa bisawmi ghadinn nawaiytu min shahri ramadan
duas.englishTranslation: I intend to keep the fast for tomorrow in the month of Ramadan.

duas.arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَمْلِكُهَا إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka min fadlika wa rahmatika fa innahu la yamlikuha illa anta
duas.englishTranslation: O Allah, I ask You for Your grace and mercy, for none possesses them but You.

duas.arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي لَكَ صُمْتُ وَبِكَ آمَنْتُ وَعَلَى رِزْقِكَ أَفْطَرْتُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni laka sumtu wa bika aamantu wa ala rizqika aftartu
duas.englishTranslation: O Allah! I fasted for You and I believe in You and I break my fast with Your sustenance.

duas.arabicText: ذَهَبَ الظَّمَأُ وَابْتَلَّتِ الْعُرُوقُ وَثَبَتَ الْأَجْرُ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
duas.transliteration: Dhahaba al-zhama'u wabtallatil-urooqu wa thabatal-ajru insha'Allah
duas.englishTranslation: The thirst has gone, the veins are moistened, and the reward is confirmed, if Allah wills.
In the name of Allah and with the blessings of Allah.

duas.arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma innaka afuwwun tuhibbul afwa fa'fu anni
duas.englishTranslation: O Allah, You are the Most Forgiving, and You love forgiveness, so forgive me.

duas.arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِرِضَاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ وَبِمُعَافَاتِكَ مِنْ عُقُوبَتِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu biridaka min sakhatika wa bimu'afatika min uqubatika
duas.englishTranslation: O Allah, I seek refuge in Your pleasure from Your displeasure, and in Your pardon from Your punishment.

duas.arabicText: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ وَارْحَمْ وَأَنتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
duas.transliteration: Rabbighfir warham wa anta khairur rahimeen
duas.englishTranslation: My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the Best of the merciful.

duas.arabicText: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ رَبِّي مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
duas.transliteration: Astaghfirullaha rabbi min kulli dhambin wa atubu ilayh
duas.englishTranslation: I ask forgiveness of Allah, my Lord, from every sin and I repent to Him.
O Allah, save me from the Fire.

duas.arabicText: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.transliteration: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-akhirati hasanatan wa qina adhaban-nar
duas.englishTranslation: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

duas.arabicText: رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا إِنَّكَ أَنتَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Rabbana taqabbal minna innaka antas-samee ul-aleem
duas.englishTranslation: Our Lord, accept from us. Indeed You are the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

duas.arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي مِنَ التَّوَّابِينَ وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنَ الْمُتَطَهِّرِينَ
duas.englishTranslation: O Allah, make me among those who repent and make me among those who purify themselves.
My Lord, increase me in knowledge.
Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the Best Disposer of affairs.
